summary: Backend API testing for Lineup Settings toggles fix. All 13 tests passed. PATCH endpoint correctly updates split_mode, lineup_auto_confirm, and proximity_radius. GET user bookings returns all required lineup fields including participants array. GET surf spot returns open_bookings for split_mode='open_nearby' bookings.
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/bookings/{booking_id} correctly validates user authorization (returns 403 for unauthorized users)
GET /api/bookings/user/{user_id} returns all 17 required fields including lineup-specific fields
GET /api/surf-spots/{spot_id} returns open_bookings array for bookings with split_mode='open_nearby'
Participants array includes full user details: participant_id, user_id, name, avatar_url, username, status, payment_status, paid_amount
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for Lineup Settings are fully functional. PATCH endpoint updates booking settings correctly. GET user bookings returns all lineup fields needed by LineupManagerDrawer. GET surf spot returns open_bookings for public sessions. Frontend toggles should work correctly now that the API returns all required fields.

patch_booking_split_mode.details: PATCH /api/bookings/{booking_id} correctly updates split_mode to 'open_nearby' or 'friends_only'

patch_booking_lineup_auto_confirm.details: PATCH /api/bookings/{booking_id} correctly updates lineup_auto_confirm to true/false

patch_booking_authorization.details: Returns 403 for unauthorized users attempting to update booking settings

get_user_bookings_lineup_fields.details: GET /api/bookings/user/{user_id} returns split_mode, lineup_auto_confirm, proximity_radius, lineup_status, lineup_closes_at, lineup_min_crew, lineup_max_crew, participants

get_user_bookings_participants_array.details: Participants array includes participant_id, user_id, name, avatar_url, username, status, payment_status, paid_amount

get_surf_spot_open_bookings.details: GET /api/surf-spots/{spot_id} returns open_bookings array with booking details for split_mode='open_nearby'

get_surf_spot_open_bookings_count.details: Returns open_bookings_count for pin badge display

integration_workflow.details: Full workflow: PATCH settings -> GET user bookings verifies persistence

surf_spot_open_bookings_sample.open_bookings: [array with id, photographer_name, location, session_date, price_per_person, spots_left, max_participants]
